_meta.description: SENTINEL MCP jurisdiction routing catalog — maps property research queries to correct data sources per city/state/county

sources.name: Texas State Fire Marshal — Arson & Investigation Reports
DOS — Business Entity Search & Contractor Licensing
Dallas County GIS — Parcel & Zoning Layers
Dallas County Clerk — Deed & Lien Records
Dallas County Fire Marshal — Inspection Reports
Dallas County Tax Office — Delinquency & Payment Records
Hanover County — Building Inspections & Code Enforcement
NYC DOB Permit Issuance + Job Filings
NYC HPD Housing Maintenance Code Violations

phoenix-az.label: Phoenix
phoenix-az._note: Phoenix building permit data is not available via API. The CKAN portal only has aggregate totals.

san-jose-ca.label: San Jose
san-jose-ca._note: San Jose CKAN building permits lack usable address fields in datastore.

sources.name: Louisville Metro KY — Building Code Enforcement
Baton Rouge Open Data — Building Permits
New Orleans Open Data — Building Permits
Kansas City Open Data — Building Permits
Austin Open Data — Issued Construction Permits
Virginia Beach Open Data — Building Permits

jacksonville-fl.label: Jacksonville
jacksonville-fl._note: No API-accessible building permit data source identified for Jacksonville.

sources.name: Charlotte — Accela Development Permits
sources._note: Parcel-based join via NC_PIN rather than street address

oklahoma-city-ok.label: Oklahoma City
oklahoma-city-ok._note: No API-accessible building permit data source identified for Oklahoma City.

sources.name: Fresno County — Land Use Code Violations
Omaha — Building Permits (Construction Activity)
sources._note: Service metadata confirms BuildingPermits layer but returned 0 features during testing - may be intermittent

sources.name: Denver Metro — Residential Construction Permits (includes Aurora)
sources._note: Denver metro permits - filter by address within Aurora

colorado-springs-co.label: Colorado Springs
colorado-springs-co._note: City GIS server not publicly accessible - no permit endpoints found

sources.name: Prince Georges County Md Open Data

discovery_strategy.step_1: Attempt portal_candidates_template URLs with HEAD request
discovery_strategy.step_5: Fall back to state-level open data portal
discovery_strategy.step_6: Log as uncovered jurisdiction for manual curation
